ddt:Target.Name: SID309_87_700_88_820_V01
ddt:Target.Description:
Applications: X62, W60A(X60) Moteurs: M9T Gen 4 ECU: SID 309 --------------------------------------------------- Auteur: MARCUTA Daniel --------------------------------------------------- Logiciels: 0088_810 Base Transverale - LM_ 34_V15 DTC: LM43_V02 MCD_Config_0088_800_CR1_DG_DGT_DAT_0_19.2.0_RI_22.2 Items_Bases_1628 ----------------------------
SID309_87_600_88_810_V01
-Added Auto Identification 88_820(VDiag $E0)
SID309_87_600_88_800_V01 --> SID309_87_600_88_810_V01
-Added Auto Identification 88_810(VDiag $E0)
SID309_87_600_88_400_V03-->SID309_87_600_88_800_V01
-Added Auto Identification 88_800(VDiag $E0) -Added Fault type $95 for DTC $0420 (DMFI 2693 ) -Added RENAULT DIDs : $20A5 $20A6 $20A7 $20A8 $20A9 $20AA $20AC $20AD $20B5 $20B6 $20B7 $20B8 $20B9 $20BA $20BC $20BD $20C0 $20C3 $20C5 $20C7 $20CB $20D6 $20D7 $20D8 $2538 $288F $2891 $2893 $292C $29B0 $29B1 - Updated list with I/O Controls - Added new state descritption for DID$2177 - Modified definition for $F681 - Revised states 02&03 for DID $22BE - Offset changet from (-128) -->(-100) for DIDs :$F406,$F407 - Modified description and definition for DID$340A - Realocated DIDs $3401, $3402, $3403, $3404 - Definition update for DID$ 2073: Numeric-->Numeric list - Updated states for DID $24AB
---------------------------------------- Documents de référence: 0087_700 0088_400 DID (RENAULT) : MCD_Config_0087_700_CR1_DG_DGT_DAT_0_18.3.0_RI_17.5 DID (FOURNISSEUR) : a_dg_dgt_das_msgdiag_r87_xx_d_a(9.0) Base de depart : SID309_87_600_88_400_V01 DTC : LM_31
Base transverse utilsé : LM_31 --------------------------------------------------- V03: - Evolutions for the injectors codes screens "M9T - I2C + Factory ICVA 0km"
V02:
- Added the screen "HOMOLOGATION DIAG FAP" (wich replace the screen "Diagnostic certification DPF")
V01:
- Added DIDs R/W Renault: $2829,$282A,$282B,$282C,$282D,$282E,$282F,$2830 - Updated DIDs $204E, $25BE according CDC - Important for team-diag: take in account to validate DIDs $2829,$282A,$282B,$282C,$282D,$282E,$282F,$2830 at the next evolution for soft 0087
=========OLDER VERSIONS============= --------------------------------------------------- Auteur: GHIGEANU Constantin --------------------------------------------------- Logiciels: 0087_600 0088_400
v01
- updated screens: "OBD_End_Of_Line"; "MFMA"; "Active ICVA adaptations of the injector in ASCII"; "Factory ICVA 0km corrections of the injector in ASCII" - Items_Bases_DDT2000_S1341

Label.Text: Readiness code completion PID 1 octet A + B
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet C + D
DATA BYTE B: On-board diagnostic evaluation and Continuous monitoring tests
DATA BYTE D: Status of tests run at least once per trip
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet B BIT B5/B6 - octet D BIT B7
DATABYTE B, BIT 6: CC monitoring readiness
DATABYTE D, BIT 7: EGR system monitoring
BIT 7: Reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')
Test complete or not applicable = 0 soit diag joué
Test not complete = 1 soit diag non joué
DATA BYTE A: Number of DTC and MIL lamp status
Number of memorized emission-related powertrain failures
DATABYTE B, BIT 5: Fuel system monitoring readiness
DATA BYTE C: Supported tests run at least once per trip
Supported tests run at least once per trip
Particle filter regeneration need diagnostic-Test value $F621
- If the soot mass <24,3g then value is 0 (no FAP imminent regeneration)
- Else, if soot mass>=24,3g, then the value is 1(the vehicle is in "imminent regeneration" mode, an APV regeneration and oil change must be done before the emission test

Label.Text: Number of times the system enters in each diagnosis' conditions (DID_$340B)
[0] Number of DC the offset learning condition was set true at least once
[1] Number of DC the diagnosis condition was set true at least once
[2] Number of DC the test condition was set true at least once
[3] Number of DC the temperature condition was set true at least once
[4] Number of DC the engine setpoint enables the test at least once
[5] Number of DC the error condition was set true at least once
[6] Number of DC the error stability condition was set true at least once
[7] Number of DC the engine setpoint enables offset learning at least once
[8] Number of DC the temperature enables calculation at least once
[9] Number of DC the exhaust mass flow enables calculation at least once
Number of criteria calculated by resolution (DID_$340D)
[0] Temperature is not within boudaries to perform test
[1] Engine Setpoint is not Ok to perform test
[2] Error is not within boundaries to perform test
[3] Error is not stable enough to learn offset
[4] Engine Setpoint is not Ok to perform Offset Learning
[5] DOC Upstream temperature exceeds limits so calculation is canceled
[6] Exhaust mass airflow exceeds limits so calculation is canceled
Number of times the system quits each diagnosis' conditions (DID_$3412)
Average of the highest durations in diagnosis conditions without diagnosis done (DID_$3436)

Label.Text: This values must be filled manualy before writing
- The "REINITIALISATION" button permets to write the initialisation values of the component, in case of changing the part.
The values are automaticly initialised at the pressing of the button, no need to write a value in the associated
In the following screens you will find two buttons: Writing and Reinitialisation.
- After reprogramming or ECU changing the button "WRITING" permets the writing of the values saved before

Label.Text: If Protected State = 1(Protected) then engine start impossible
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
In thise case the ECM is unprotected and the engine start is allowed
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
the ECM is protected because it does not receive the BCM frame: The ECM does not allowe the engine start.
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
The ECM is protected because the BCM does not respond correctly : The ECM does not allowe the engine start.
-> The BCM has not identified the key or cadr
-> The ECM is not connected on the vehicle on which he has learned the code
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
The ECM is virgin and protected because the BCM does not send the secret key: The ECM does not allowe the engine start.
-> The BCM is not autorised to send the secret key
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
The ECM is "autoprotected" and does not allowe the engine start.
-> the ECM was under a "intrusion" tentative or it detects an internal error (EEPROM, FLASH...)
